metadata.description: NarAI Labs plugins for Claude Code — AI-powered development tools

plugins.name: browser-qa
plugins.description: AI-powered QA agent that browses your web app, discovers screens and interactive elements, tests CRUD lifecycles, verifies actions, runs permutations, and auto-fixes bugs — targeting 90%+ coverage

plugins.name: aws-connector
plugins.description: Read-only AWS connector — Lambda functions, RDS instances, S3 buckets, CloudWatch metrics, DynamoDB tables. Built on narai-primitives. JSON-envelope CLI + library API with approval gate and hardship logging.

plugins.name: confluence-connector
plugins.description: Read-only Confluence connector — page retrieval, CQL search, space metadata. Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: db-connector
plugins.description: Policy-gated read-only database connector — PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, SQL Server, MongoDB, DynamoDB, Oracle. Approval gate (allow / present / escalate / deny) per query kind, with curate-and-promote hardship logging.

plugins.name: gcp-connector
plugins.description: Read-only GCP connector — Cloud Run services, Cloud SQL instances, Pub/Sub topics, Cloud Logging entries. Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: github-connector
plugins.description: Read-only GitHub connector — repo info, code search, issues, pull requests, file retrieval, PR review comments. Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: gitlab-connector
plugins.description: Read + write GitLab connector — 14 read + 18 write + 1 admin action across projects, issues, merge requests, notes, releases, and CI pipelines. Self-hosted supported via GITLAB_HOST. Policy-gated (admin denied by default; operator opts in via ~/.gitlab-connector/config.yaml). Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: jira-connector
plugins.description: Read-only Jira connector — JQL search, single-issue retrieval, project metadata. Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: linear-connector
plugins.description: Read + write Linear connector — 7 read actions (issue search, comments, projects) and 7 write actions (create/update/archive issues, comments, attachment links). GraphQL-based, policy-gated. Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: git-connector
plugins.description: Pre-tool-use hook that gates risky git commands — push to main is denied; force-push, branch deletion, reset --hard, checkout --, clean -f all ask for confirmation. No agents or actions, hooks only. Rules can be selectively disabled via NARAI_GATE_DISABLE.

plugins.name: notion-connector
plugins.description: Read-only Notion connector — page and database fetching, search, database queries with filters. Built on narai-primitives.

plugins.name: connector-creator
plugins.description: Scaffold custom connectors for narai-primitives' gather() — wraps any SaaS API, REST/GraphQL endpoint, SDK, or CLI tool into a minimal local connector at .connectors/connectors/<slug>/. Project- or user-scoped. Trigger phrases: 'wrap our internal orders API', 'I want to query Stripe from Claude', 'add Slack to our agents'.

plugins.name: doc-wiki
plugins.description: Documentation wiki generator and maintainer for Claude Code. Bootstrap, ingest, query, lint, refresh — 10 namespaced /doc-wiki:* slash commands. Builds on narai-primitives + bundled connectors.
